# Somrit Dasgupta

> Personal site of Somrit Dasgupta — engineering, blog, live GitHub activity, and CV.

## Pages

- [About](/): Introduction, featured projects, and links.
- [Blog](/blog): Engineering essays, notes, and project write-ups.
- [Activity](/activity): Live GitHub contributions and commit history.
- [CV](/cv): Resume and downloadable PDF.

## Blog

- [Hello World](/blog/hello-world): First post — what this site is and how it's built.
- [MDX Showcase](/blog/mdx-showcase): Reference for all custom MDX components available in posts.

## Optional

- [RSS](/rss.xml): Feed of published blog posts.
